caption: A man with blonde hair, glasses, and white headphones wears a navy blue t-shirt while sitting in front of a microphone. Behind him is a decorated Christmas tree with colorful lights and a framed sports jersey. In one sequence, an on-screen keyboard is visible with the text "ITEM NAME" at the top and "maxx crosby" typed into a search bar. The keyboard includes buttons for "EXIT," "BACK," "CAPS," "CLEAR," and "DONE." As the scene progresses, the man is shown speaking, and the screen transitions to a "SUBSTITUTION" menu for a football video game. This menu displays "Current Position LET" and a list of "AVAILABLE PLAYERS" with various athlete cards. On the right side of the interface, a profile for "MAXX CROSBY" is shown, listing his position as "LE" and his team as "Raiders," along with a list of "KEY ATTRIBUTES" such as "HEIGHT" and "SPEED."
